channel.title: Thoughts on My Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Thoughts on My Blog

item.title: validation
item.description:
Validation

Date: 04-12-25

Do i need someone else validation to do something, or if I’m doing something unwise do i need to hide it from someone else.

  • From when i started to care about someone’s else thoughts on myself and the things i do. I give these rights only to my parents and no one else. Then why i still care about and hide things when i suppose to not hide these things, it’s not like I’m committing any crime.
  • I need no respect in any aspect, even if I’m committing any crime in other people’s view. I should be free form these worldly thoughts but still I’m not. I still care about view and thoughts of other person regarding myself.
  • But the thing is, i should only care the views and thoughts of my parents and no one else.
  • If my conscience say i am doing rights or wrong, that i should care and try to fix that.
  • If someone else reading this, I’m sorry but I’m not trying to sound arrogant it’s just my thoughts which i should follow.
